title: RNA snowball raw files
author: Kalirad, Ata
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the files generated by a model of sequence divergence on a holey fitness landscape based on RNA folding to simulate the accumulation of the Dobzhansky-Muller incompatibilities (DMIs). 

 For more information, see https://github.com/Kalirad/RNA_pop_snowball .
steps_raw:
This repository contains the files generated by a model of sequence divergence on a holey fitness landscape based on RNA folding to simulate the accumulation of the Dobzhansky-Muller incompatibilities (DMIs). 

 For more information, see https://github.com/Kalirad/RNA_pop_snowball .
